description_long: This chest of drawers features a stepped, geometric design with a rich, dark wood veneer covering most of its surfaces. The front face displays three drawers: a single upper drawer with a pinkish, floral-embossed panel and two lower drawers with gold-toned, ornate patterns. Each drawer is adorned with a large, circular ring pull handle, adding a touch of vintage elegance. The top surface is decorated with a subtle inlaid geometric motif, further enhancing its decorative appeal. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the deep, polished wood grain. The overall construction appears sturdy and solid, suitable for both decorative and functional use in an urban environment.
description: A stepped, dark wood chest of drawers with ornate patterned drawer fronts and large ring handles, featuring decorative inlays and a polished finish.
description_view_0: The back view reveals a plain, polished wood surface with a rich brown grain and no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the stepped profile and continuous wood grain, with no visible drawers or decorative features.
description_view_2: The front view displays three drawers with ornate, embossed panels and large ring handles, as well as the decorative inlay on the top surface.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the stepped shape and uninterrupted wood finish without any visible drawers.
